body:
## Summary
- add a browser speech-synthesis stub and Playwright coverage for Practice and routed Quiz question-audio stop states
- stop active Practice question audio on answer selection and pass the persisted playback rate into Practice feedback audio
- restore the localized Settings listen-first toggle and strengthen AudioButton stop-lifecycle parity guards
- append the UIUX component-lane journal handoff

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-audio-button-accessibility-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "AudioButton|question audio|listen-first"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `npm run test:a11y-labels`
- `npm run test:theme-discipline`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-settings-route-copy-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "settings|audio|listen|accessibility"`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' timeout 300s npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' timeout 180s npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/practice-feedback.spec.ts --workers=1 --grep "question audio controls expose a browser stop state"`
title: uiux: add question audio stop e2e
